original: A living sextoy, BionaHoles are cloned vaginas in advanced life-support sheaths. This particular model has a black, nondescript cylinder. When you found it, there was a tag nearby with a familiar name printed on it: Syri Dorna. Underneath was a string of text and numbers you couldn’t parse, followed by something about ‘sample collected from incident 376-A2.’ The transporter accident, maybe?
You’re not really in the mood to masturbate right now....
translation: 你现在没什么兴致自慰……
